treatments.title: Diabetes Treatment
treatments.summary: Timely testing, physician consultation, medicine management, and lifestyle guidance for diabetes care.
treatmentOptions: Blood sugar testing and medical evaluation
treatments.whenToVisit: Visit a doctor if you notice repeated high blood sugar symptoms, fatigue, weight change, or delayed healing.

treatments.title: Heart Disease Treatment
treatments.summary: Cardiology consultation and diagnostic evaluation for chest pain, ECG changes, and heart health risks.
treatments.whenToVisit: Seek medical attention urgently for chest pain, breathlessness, dizziness, or persistent palpitations.

treatments.title: Hypertension Care
treatments.summary: Blood pressure evaluation, monitoring, and long-term risk reduction support.
treatments.whenToVisit: Visit for repeated high blood pressure readings, headache, dizziness, or cardiovascular risk review.

treatments.title: Joint Pain Treatment
treatments.summary: Orthopedic review and imaging support for persistent pain, stiffness, and mobility concerns.
treatments.whenToVisit: Visit if pain persists, movement is restricted, or swelling keeps recurring.

treatments.title: Fever and Infection Treatment
treatments.summary: Early medical evaluation, pathology support, and medicine planning for seasonal and infectious illness.
symptoms: Cough, sore throat, or digestive upset
treatments.whenToVisit: Visit if fever lasts beyond a day or two, is recurrent, or is associated with weakness, breathing difficulty, or dehydration.
